author: y4rr
content: Plan: Sprint B.5.b — add forward-parity conformance tests for 5 models in ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance_vision_models.rs, add fixtures to fixtures.json and regenerate_vision_fixtures.py, then verify clean build + clippy. Reference: torchvision 0.21.x. Models: ConvNeXt (#861), EfficientNet (#863), MobileNetV2+V3 (#865), Swin (#866), ViT (#868). No cascade_skip for these 5 lanes — implementation is complete and tests will pass. Working with random-init zero input so no weight downloads needed.
